title: Paint Booth PB-101
notes: Standard industrial powder coating booth. Side draft. Medium automotive components.

title: Paint Booth PB-102
notes: Compact powder booth for small batch production. Rear access.

title: Paint Booth PB-104
notes: Extended powder booth for longer components. Same cross-section as PB-101 (so same airflow and fans), more filters for the larger floor area.

title: Paint Booth PB-115
notes: Large wet booth with water curtain for solvent-based liquid paint. Stainless construction for corrosion resistance.

title: Paint Booth PB-120
notes: Powder booth with quick color-change cyclone. Side access. Frequent color changes.

title: Bill of Materials - PB-101
items: 3x axial exhaust fan (1.5kW), 36x dry panel filter 600x600, GI sheet 1.6mm wall panels, LED light fittings IP65 x8, control panel with VFD, ducting GI 400mm
notes: Complete material list for the 10x6 powder booth PB-101.

title: Bill of Materials - PB-115
items: 4x axial exhaust fan (2.2kW), 51x water-wash filter modules, SS304 sheet 2mm panels, water pump 5HP, water curtain assembly, LED light fittings IP66 x12, PLC control panel
notes: Complete material list for the 12x7 wet booth PB-115.

title: Quotation QT-2024-031 - Powder Booth 10x6
notes: Quotation for a 10m x 6m powder coating booth, 3 fans, 36 dry filters, GI construction, installation included.

title: Quotation QT-2024-047 - Compact Powder Booth 8x5
notes: Quotation for an 8m x 5m compact powder booth, 3 fans, 24 dry filters, GI construction.

title: Quotation QT-2024-061 - Powder Booth 12x6
notes: Quotation for a 12m x 6m powder coating booth, 3 fans, 44 dry filters, GI construction, installation included.

title: Quotation QT-2024-052 - Wet Booth 12x7
notes: Quotation for a 12m x 7m water-wash liquid paint booth, 4 fans, SS304 construction, water treatment included.

title: Engineering Standard - Paint Booth Sizing
notes: ATS / NFPA 33 design standard. Exhaust airflow = open face area (width x height) x face velocity (0.4-0.5 m/s, use 0.45) x 3600. One axial exhaust fan per ~13000 m3/h. Dry filter panels sized at 0.6 per m2 of floor area for adequate overspray capture. Powder process -> GI construction with dry filters; liquid/solvent -> SS304 with water-wash filtration.
